tagline: Tucson-based supplier of EFI gasoline piston engines (35–150 cc) and line-replaceable engine pods for tactical UAS, plus electronic speed controllers and heavy-duty servos. Offers DA MIL SPEC variants and dyno/thermal testing services. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public program affiliations not evident.
